englishDefinitions: Makes the color or beauty of your eyes more noticeable.
Used especially about clothing, makeup, or colors that make someone’s eyes look attractive.
persianTranslation: رنگ چشم‌هایت را بیشتر نشان می‌دهد
باعث می‌شود چشم‌هایت زیباتر به نظر برسند
examples: That blue shirt really brings out your eyes.
The green scarf brings out your eyes beautifully.
Try this eyeshadow; it brings out your eyes.
